latest_news.headline: Fresh Iranian missile/drone barrage on Gulf states — Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, UAE all intercept
latest_news.source: ABC News / Kuwait News Agency / Saudi MOD
latest_news.text: Overnight barrage: Kuwaiti air defense engaged intercepting hostile missiles/drones. UAE MOD confirms air defense activity. Saudi Arabia targeting drones aimed at Eastern Province oil infrastructure. Qatar countering missile attack. Continued pattern of Iranian Gulf bombardment.

latest_news.headline: 12+ MQ-9 Reaper drones ($16M each, $330M total) lost in Iran combat operations
latest_news.text: More than a dozen MQ-9 Reaper drones destroyed by Iranian missile fire or on-ground strikes. Up from 11 reported March 9. Significant US asset attrition showing effectiveness of Iranian layered air defenses. US now transitioning to LUCAS drones.

latest_news.headline: US drops 5,000-lb bunker buster bombs on hardened Iranian missile sites at Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: CENTCOM confirms multiple 5,000-lb deep penetrator munitions dropped on reinforced Iranian missile sites along Hormuz coastline. Part of effort to prevent Iran from striking commercial shipping.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms death of security chief Ali Larijani — SNSC head killed in Israeli strike
latest_news.text: Iran's Supreme National Security Council confirms Ali Larijani killed alongside son and protection team. Israel claimed the strike. Larijani was de facto national security chief — major blow to Iranian command structure.

latest_news.headline: Lebanon: 912 killed, 800K+ displaced — ground ops expanding south of Zahrani
latest_news.text: Updated death toll: 912 killed, 2,000+ injured in Lebanon. 800K+ displaced (19% of population). Israeli ground operations expanding. Bourj Hammoud apartment strike in NE Beirut. ABC reports Lebanon approaching 'tipping point' risk of state collapse.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 22, 08:04 UTC) — War Day 20. Overnight: (1) Fresh Iranian barrage on Gulf states — all intercepted but pattern continues; (2) 12+ MQ-9 Reapers lost ($330M) — US asset attrition accelerating; (3) Bunker busters on Hormuz missile sites — US escalating munitions; (4) Larijani death confirmed by Iran — command structure degraded; (5) Lebanon: 912 killed, 800K displaced, state 'tipping point'. Senate hearing ongoing — Gabbard testifying. Oil ~$102.
